description: CompositionGrey shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, two pockets and brand logo on the left legFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts feature Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.Model statisticsThe product is a size M with length 26.5" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
